headline.title: 使用MicroPython和WASM在沙箱中运行Python代码
headline.summary: Simon Willison 发布名为 micropython-wasm 的实验性包，通过将 MicroPython 编译为 WebAssembly，实现在浏览器或服务器端沙箱中安全运行任意 Python 代码，并已作为 Datasette Agent 的插件使用。
headline.title_en: Running Python code in a sandbox with MicroPython and WASM
headline.summary_en: Simon Willison releases an experimental package called micropython-wasm that compiles MicroPython to WebAssembly, enabling safe execution of arbitrary Python code in a browser or server-side sandbox, already used as a plugin for Datasette Agent.
headline.reason: 该技术方案兼具安全性与实用性，有望成为下一代代码沙箱的基础组件，且昨日发布后即获开发者社区广泛关注，得分最高。
headline.reason_en: This technical approach combines safety and practicality, potentially becoming a foundational component for next-generation code sandboxes; it gained widespread developer attention upon release yesterday with the highest score.
